Or they can start Saturday.

items.title: It’s just supply and demand, man. The organization isn’t setting those prices. The secondary market is.
items.author: Mike Finger
items.body_excerpt:
It’s just supply and demand, man. The organization isn’t setting those prices. The secondary market is. 

And if Knicks fans are willing to offer Spurs fans that much money, I’m certainly not going to lecture people about accepting an offer that I probably wouldn’t turn down, either.

items.title: “We still have this belief because we've seen it."
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
“We still have this belief because we've seen it."

Of the 38 teams in Finals history to fall in a 3-1 hole, only one has bounced back to win a championship.

For a Spurs squad looking to fight back against New York, the 2016 Cavs stand as the lone beacon of hope.
www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: With NBA title hopes fading, Spurs battle both history and math
media.description: Only one team in Finals history has overcome a 3-1 deficit to win a championship. The Spurs are aiming to be the second.

items.title: Bogdan Bogdanović on The NBA Culture Shock, Surviving Partizan, & Playing 3-on-5!
items.author: Thanalysis Show
items.body_excerpt: On this episode, we sit down with LA Clipper sniper and Serbian basketball legend, Bogdan Bogdanović! Bogdan opens up about his incredible journey from riding the bus to practice in Belgrade to facing off against Steph Curry and Giannis Antetokounmpo in the NBA. We dive deep…

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Vince Legarza and Brad Jones as assistant coaches. Legarza was an assistant with Mike Budenholzer on the Suns and Bucks. He and Taylor Jenkins both worked together under Budenholzer on the Hawks. Jones was an assistant for Jenkins on the Griz
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Vince Legarza and Brad Jones as assistant coaches. Legarza was an assistant with Mike Budenholzer on the Suns and Bucks. He and Taylor Jenkins both worked together under Budenholzer on the Hawks. Jones was an assistant for Jenkins on the Grizzlies.

items.title: Game 4 of the Finals is now the most-viral NBA game ever on social media, generating over 3 billion views.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Game 4 of the Finals is now the most-viral NBA game ever on social media, generating over 3 billion views.

For context, the entire Finals series between the Thunder and the Pacers last year generated fewer than 5 billion views on social media across all 7 games combined.

items.title: Mitch Johnson and De’Aaron Fox have received plenty of heat in the wake of Game 4.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Mitch Johnson and De’Aaron Fox have received plenty of heat in the wake of Game 4.

“I think I’ve probably been fired 212 times and we’ve traded Fox 72 times,” Mitch said.

On how the coach and All-Star guard aren’t letting the critics get to them:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Spurs' Mitch Johnson, De'Aaron Fox ignore criticism after questionable decisions
media.description: The 39-year-old coach and two-time All-Star guard respond to the heat they received after the Spurs' gut-wrenching 107-106 loss that sent them to the brink of elimination.

items.title: The NBA needs to partner with NYC to build a fake city block that Knicks fans can legally demolish after they win.
items.author: jusBULLSHITTINaround
items.body_excerpt: Instead of fans destroying real stuff after huge games, NYC should build a fake block full of cheap breakaway windows, fake street signs, and cardboard storefronts, then let fans demolish it after the game. Call it Rage Block. Sell tickets. Put it on LP. Everyone wins.
